<robotNode content="{"headers":[],"params":[],"formParams":[{"field":"fd_3a452c77ce2c20","fieldText":"CRM商机编号","dataType":"String","fieldName":"crmsjbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09db17c1a016","fieldText":"转交付项目编号","dataType":"String","fieldName":"zjfxmbh","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3a452cd3fd3328","fieldText":"项目名称：","dataType":"String","fieldName":"xmmc","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09cf8e8aea9a","fieldText":"累计预投成本","dataType":"Double","fieldName":"ytje","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3a4a9a1b1cd3b6","fieldText":"主合同预计开始日期","dataType":"Date","fieldName":"zhtyjksrq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3a4a9a1c2f5e46","fieldText":"主合同预计结束日期","dataType":"Date","fieldName":"zhtyjjsrq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09c87bcf61e2","fieldText":"CRM主报价单（URL）：","dataType":"String","fieldName":"crmzbjd_url_","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_begin_date","fieldText":"本次预投计划开始日期","dataType":"Date","fieldName":"bcytjhksrq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_end_date","fieldText":"本次预投计划结束日期","dataType":"Date","fieldName":"bcytjhjsrq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3a4530cc811154","fieldText":"本次内部人工成本及项目费用","dataType":"Double","fieldName":"bcytnbrgcb","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3a4530d38615b6","fieldText":"本次预投外采成本","dataType":"Double","fieldName":"bcytwccb","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3a4530148f563e","fieldText":"本次预投工作概述：","dataType":"String","fieldName":"bcytgzgs","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09cd843e0440","fieldText":"主合同总预算成本","dataType":"Double","fieldName":"zhtzyscb","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09cd7bd21634","fieldText":"主合同预计签署日期：","dataType":"Date","fieldName":"zhtyjqsrq","defaultValue":""},{"field":"docCreator","fieldText":"申请人","dataType":"com.landray.kmss.sys.organization.model.SysOrgPerson","fieldName":"lctjr","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09cec3d2a8c8","fieldText":"历次内部人工成本及项目费用","dataType":"Double","fieldName":"lcytnbrgcb_xmfy_bhbc_","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fd_3d09cee1fdba04","fieldText":"历次预投外采成本","dataType":"Double","fieldName":"lcytwc_hwbrt_cb_bhbc_","defaultValue":""},{"field":"fdId","fieldText":"ID","dataType":"String","fieldName":"ytsplcid","defaultValue":""}],"responseParams":[],"restfulUrl":"https://owork.shanghai-electric.com/api/workflow/hooks/NjY2N2U4ODFiMjkyZTYxYWM2ZWU2NzY5"}" id="N54" name="机器人节点" unid="*@Robot@restfulRobotNode" x="600" y="780"/>
<endNode id="N3" name="结束节点" x="600" y="900"/>
